items.summary: Victoria and South Australia meet in the final of the Sheffield Shield at Melbourne's Junction Oval.

items.title: How Australians interact with birds and wildlife around their homes

items.title: Advocates call for funding of transplant strategy to arrest declining organ donation rate

items.title: Review of Tasmania's climate laws finds net zero status could be 'temporary'
items.summary: Tasmania loves to boast about its net zero emissions. But a new report has found that status could be "temporary" if further actions are not taken.

items.summary: Qantas will increase capacity on flights between Australia and Europe after Easter, which experts say may see the "kangaroo route" evolve.

items.title: At 104, George Franklin is months away from becoming the world's oldest conductor

items.summary: Southern Lebanon has a "very long history" of conflict with Israel, and many of its residents remember past wars clearly. But they say the latest incursion feels different.

items.title: Why One Nation is not winning many lower house seats in the SA election despite its high vote

items.summary: A former NT Police Acting Assistant Commissioner has claimed his career is in tatters after he was overlooked for promotion and demoted for "reasons including" his race.
